news.title: Ubisoft is reportedly closing two studios and restructuring another, with around 380 people expected to be laid off
news.titleEN: Ubisoft is reportedly closing two studios and restructuring another, with around 380 people expected to be laid off
news.desc: Two of Ubisoft's smaller studios, Ubisoft Winnipeg, and Ubisoft Belgrade, are being shuttered. Insider Gaming was first to break the news, but reports from Game Developer, and VGC have shed more light on the broader impact. Read more
news.descEN: Two of Ubisoft's smaller studios, Ubisoft Winnipeg, and Ubisoft Belgrade, are being shuttered. Insider Gaming was first to break the news, but reports from Game Developer, and VGC have shed more light on the broader impact. Read more

news.title: Xbox reportedly preparing for "significant" lay-offs, as Asha Sharma's big "reset" plan comes into full force
news.titleEN: Xbox reportedly preparing for "significant" lay-offs, as Asha Sharma's big "reset" plan comes into full force
news.desc: Days after its gaming showcase, Xbox is reportedly slashing budgets and preparing to lay off a "significant" number of staff, as part of new CEO Asha Sharma's business "reset" for the Xbox brand. Read more
news.descEN: Days after its gaming showcase, Xbox is reportedly slashing budgets and preparing to lay off a "significant" number of staff, as part of new CEO Asha Sharma's business "reset" for the Xbox brand. Read more
